endermars21.pool_switcher.name: Item Pool Switcher
endermars21.pool_switcher.dialog.confirm: This dialog is provided by the %s extension and does the same things as the dialog provided by the Fetchr data pack with the only difference being that this allows the %s data pack to directly change the item pool after confirming the operator status.
endermars21.pool_switcher.pool.fetchr.de: The default item pool provided by Fetchr.
endermars21.pool_switcher.message.pool_c: The current item pool has been changed to %s.
